prose: Formaldehyde HOMO–LUMO gap calculated using DFT with B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry was the user-supplied formaldehyde.xyz file (4 atoms) as a fixed single point. SCF converged in 8 cycles with no warnings. The frontier orbital gap is **5.8696712 eV**, derived from HOMO at −7.652306 eV and LUMO at −1.782636 eV. Koopmans-style orbital-gap estimate; not an excitation energy. Full orbital spectrum reported: HOMO−2 through LUMO+2. Integrity status OK, trustworthy.
